title: viola × desetangsii
intro: Viola × desetangsii is a hybrid viola species that is native to China, known for its medicinal and ornamental properties. The plant contains flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola × desetangsii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and protecting against oxidative stress and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Viola × desetangsii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
